subcodes.first_line: God willing, by the grace of the Beloved of the horizons, mayest thou be free from all else save God, be wholly absorbed in Him, and in all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت محبوب آفاق از ما سوی الله فارغ باشی و باو مشغول و در جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to action, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wisdom [hikmat]
